channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bill Ackman's vision of the American Dream
item.description: The billionaire investor discusses reviving faith in capitalism and how a family crisis is reshaping his legacy.

item.title: Christopher Nolan rejected from film school, now worth $250 million
item.description: Before becoming a top director, Christopher Nolan faced rejection: 'Film school didn't want me.'

item.title: Hugging Face used Chinese AI model to fight autonomous cyberattack due to U.S. guardrails
item.description: Hugging Face experienced one of the first autonomous AI cyberattacks and found American models inadequate for defense.

item.title: Mark Cuban proposes rewarding every employee, from CEO to janitor, with company stock to address income inequality
item.description: Cuban said he wants all CEOs to follow his example of giving equity to every employee.
